Description: AI shoots at the player instead of just chasing.
Example Use Case: Enemies fire at the player from distance instead of rushing.

Description: AI squads patrol an area instead of standing still.
Example Use Case: Guard units walk between waypoints in a zone.

Description: AI moves between cover points during combat.
Example Use Case: NPCs take cover behind objects while under fire.

Description: If a squad is attacked, they can call backup from another squad.
Example Use Case: Nearby squads join the fight after hearing gunfire.

Description: AI uses flanking and suppression instead of charging.
Example Use Case: Enemies split and attack from multiple angles.
